narrative:
Springfield H (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,081 registered voters, with 45.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.1%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
